description: Programming language families — 49 tasks from Terminal-Bench, grouped by primary language/paradigm. Use with: kbench --family <name>

python.description: Python engineering tasks (async, packaging, migration, scripting)

c-cpp.description: C and C++ systems programming (compilation, graphics, memory, cross-compilation)

javascript.description: JavaScript and Node.js tasks (security filters, binary parsing, emulators)

r.description: R language and statistical computing (Bayesian inference, MCMC, Stan)

functional.description: Functional and formal languages (OCaml, Scheme, Coq, HDL)

sql.description: SQL and data querying languages (SQLite, SPARQL, WAL recovery)

ml.description: Machine learning frameworks (PyTorch, Caffe, HuggingFace, fastText)

scientific.description: Scientific computing (bioinformatics, physics simulation, numerical methods)

polyglot.description: Multi-language and protocol tasks (Rust+C, C+Python, gRPC)
